metadata.title: Mwaslaty - Easy Transportation in Egypt
metadata.description: Your comprehensive guide to transportation across Egypt.

auth.name: Name
auth.serviceRequiredText: You can browse this page freely. Login or create an account to use this service.
auth.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.headline: Navigate Egypt with Ease
home.description: Plan public transportation routes across Egypt using metro, buses, microbuses, and community knowledge in one focused platform.
home.aiChatBotDesc: Ask natural-language route questions and get step-by-step guidance.
home.manualSearchDesc: Search routes manually with estimated cost, time, and transport modes.
home.importantStopsDesc: Explore major transport hubs such as Ramses, Tahrir, Aboud, and El-Monib.
home.communityRoutesDesc: Submit routes, vote on accuracy, and improve the network.

chatbot.title: Mwaslaty Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Ask anything about getting around Egypt.
chatbot.placeholder: Ask about routes, e.g. From Maadi to New Cairo
chatbot.hint: Try asking: From Heliopolis to Downtown or Best route to Cairo Airport
chatbot.intro: Ask me anything about getting around Egypt.
chatbot.response: I found route options for your trip:

search.title: Route Planner
search.subtitle: Plan your journey across Egypt with step-by-step directions.
search.emptyText: Enter your starting point and destination to find the best routes across Egypt.

stops.title: Important Transportation Stops
stops.subtitle: Explore Egypt's major transportation hubs with route information and connections.
stops.notFoundText: Help improve the network by adding missing stops or routes.
stops.gettingHereText: This stop is accessible via multiple transportation modes. Check routes for available connections.

userRoutes.title: Community Routes
userRoutes.subtitle: Help improve Egypt's transportation network by sharing routes and voting on submissions.

credits.title: Credits & Billing
credits.subtitle: Manage usage and purchase credits for route services.

footer.text: Connecting all of Egypt, one route at a time.
